name: Shadow Magic
description: Warriors of Shadow practice stealth and subterfuge, harnessing the power of the Shadowfell. They are at home in darkness, able to draw gloom around themselves to hide, leap from shadow to shadow, and take on a wraithlike form.
shortDescription: Harness Shadow Power for Stealth and Subterfuge

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.description: You have learned to draw on the power of the Shadowfell, gaining the following benefits.

details.darkness: {@b Darkness.} You can expend 1 Focus Point to cast the {@spell Darkness|XPHB} spell without spell components. You can see within the spell's area when you cast it with this feature. While the spell persists, you can move its area of {@spell Darkness|XPHB} to a space within 60 feet of yourself at the start of each of your turns.
details.darkvision: {@b Darkvision.} You gain {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} with a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision|XPHB}, its range increases by 60 feet.
details.shadowyFigments: {@b Shadowy Figments.} You know the {@spell Minor Illusion|XPHB} spell. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for it.

features.name: Shadow Step
features.description: While you are in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, you can take a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} to teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is also in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}. You then have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next melee attack you make before the end of the turn.

features.name: Improved Shadow Step
features.description: You can draw on your Shadowfell connection to empower your teleportation. When you use your Shadow Step, you can expend 1 Focus Point to remove the requirement that you must start and end in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} for that use of the feature. As part of this {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can make an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} immediately after you teleport.

features.name: Cloak of Shadows
features.description: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action while entirely within {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, you can expend 3 Focus Points to shroud yourself with shadows for 1 minute, until you have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, or until you end your turn in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}. While shrouded by these shadows, you gain the following benefits.

details.invisibility: {@b Invisibility.} You have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.
details.partiallyIncorporeal: {@b Partially Incorporeal.} You can move through occupied spaces as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. If you end your turn in such a space, you are shunted to the last unoccupied space you were in.
details.shadowFlurry: {@b Shadow Flurry.} You can use your Flurry of Blows without expending any Focus Points.
